title: Gold Not Old
description: Mostly modern Minecraft with a mostly not-modern look and feel!
body: ![Gold Not Old Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb3ea5a9d1a0bd92c9868b463eea1c182b3c2052.png) [](https://modrinth.com/modpack/gold-not-old) [](https://fabricmc.net) [](https://git.nostalgica.net/Lasting-Legacy/Content-Monorepo) [](https://discord.com/invite/Gbw57X3qtM) # Information Gold Not Old is a modpack intended to retain much of Minecraft's modern features and gameplay, but with a lot of the old gameplay feel, structures, world generation and visual aesthetic. # Features ## A New-Old World ### Classic-Style World Generation Thanks to [Moderner Beta](https://modrinth.com/mod/moderner-beta), world generation has been rolled back in a couple ways: - The default "Changed World" world type resembles the surface generation of release 1.7, with all the surface biomes and world height of the latest Minecraft release. This also affects the world generation for AMPLIFIED! and Large Biomes world types. - The "Beta" world type mimics the terrain generation of Beta with modern biomes. - The "Adventure" world type mimics the terrain generation of the Adventure Update (b1.8-r1.6.4) with modern biomes. - Modern world generation is available in the "Caves & Cliffs" world type. ### Old Villages, New Villagers With the [Classic Villages](https://modrinth.com/datapack/classic-villages) data pack, villages now generate in mostly the same manner as they did before the Village & Pillage update, while also including workstations to allow modern villager mechanics to function. ## A New-Old Aesthetic ### Old Textures, Sounds and Visuals Using resource packs such as [Golden Days Base](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-days) and the [Programmer Art Continuation Project](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pacp), as well as mods like [Animatium](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatium), [Timeless](https://modrinth.com/mod/timeless) and [No Mob Latency](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-mob-latency), among others, visuals, sounds and gameplay feel from older versions of the game have been brought to the modern day! ### Old Combat While most of modern vanilla Minecraft's gameplay features are retained, combat stands at one of the primary gameplay changes. Combat from 1.8 has been reintroduced, though without sword blocking to facilitate using the Shield, like in vanilla. # Special Thanks - [hsza](https://modrinth.com/user/hsza) and [omo50](https://modrinth.com/user/rjxkenshin) for making Simply Optimized Forked, the basis of this modpack - Resource Packs - [PoeticRainbow](https://modrinth.com/user/PoeticRainbow) for making the Golden Days resource pack - [mzov_jen](https://modrinth.com/user/mzov_jen) for making the Programmer Art Continuation Project
